name: sr-gtm-foundation
description: Second Rodeo's GTM Foundation — six skills that help a founder identify where they are in the PMF stack, then sharpen the three pillars that compound: narrative, ICP, and distribution. Start with `sr-gtm-system`, the orchestrator that figures out where you are and routes you to the right next step. Built around the SR thesis that founders don't have a GTM problem, they have a sequence problem.
